text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
They added a bunch of items to the<n>cafeteria
menu.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Roast beef, fried chicken, spare ribs,<n>beef tongue
stew...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Sounds pretty good... The texture and<n>juiciness of
a good hunk of meat can't be<n>matched.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh... I look forward to lunch.
